description.value: > Godclaw Disciple You worship the amalgamation of lawful deities known as the Godclaw. You gain a +2 trait bonus on Knowledge (religion) checks related to lawful deities, their clergy, their mythology, and their tenets. Additionally, Knowledge (religion) is a class skill for you. You must be of a lawful alignment to take this trait. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Campaign Setting: Path of the Hellknight Â© 2016, Paizo Inc.; Author: F. Wesley Schneider.
